info.title: RocketReach API
info.description: RocketReach API provides access to contact information for over 700M professionals and 60M companies. Retrieve email addresses, phone numbers, job history, education, skills, and company data.

get.description: Retrieve and manage account details including credit usage and rate limits.

post.description: Generate a new API key for your RocketReach account.

api_key.description: The API key for your account.
The API key for your account.

get.summary: Look up a person's contact information
get.description: Retrieve contact information for a specific person by providing identifying details such as name, email, LinkedIn URL, or RocketReach profile ID.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the desired profile. Must specify along with current_employer.

parameters.name: current_employer
parameters.description: Current employer of the desired profile. Must specify along with name.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: An email address for the desired profile.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: RocketReach internal unique profile ID.

parameters.name: linkedin_url
parameters.description: LinkedIn URL of the desired profile.

parameters.name: lookup_type
parameters.description: Type of lookup to perform.

parameters.name: npi_number
parameters.description: An NPI number for the desired profile (US healthcare professional).

parameters.name: return_cached_emails
parameters.description: Controls whether cached emails are included in initial response. Defaults to true.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Job title of the desired profile.

parameters.name: webhook_id
parameters.description: Your webhook's unique ID number for asynchronous callbacks.

RR-Request-ID.description: Lookup unique identifier, also sent in the header of webhook.

get.description: Check the status of one or more asynchronous person lookups by their profile IDs.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: List of Profile IDs to check status for.

post.description: Search for professionals matching specified criteria such as name, title, employer, location, skills, and more.
Perform batch lookups for multiple people at once using search criteria.

get.summary: Look up a person and their company
get.description: Retrieve contact information for a specific person along with their company details.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the desired profile. Must specify along with current_employer.

parameters.name: current_employer
parameters.description: Current employer of the desired profile. Must specify along with name.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: An email address for the desired profile.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: RocketReach internal unique profile ID.

parameters.name: linkedin_url
parameters.description: LinkedIn URL of the desired profile.

parameters.name: lookup_type
parameters.description: Type of lookup to perform.

parameters.name: npi_number
parameters.description: An NPI number for the desired profile (US healthcare professional).

parameters.name: return_cached_emails
parameters.description: Controls whether cached emails are included in initial response. Defaults to true.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Job title of the desired profile.

parameters.name: webhook_id
parameters.description: Your webhook's unique ID number for asynchronous callbacks.

200.description: Person and company profile retrieved successfully.

get.description: Retrieve company information by name, domain, email domain, industry, location, or other criteria.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Include companies with these names.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Include companies with these domains.

parameters.name: email_domain
parameters.description: Include companies with these email domains.

parameters.name: industry
parameters.description: Include companies focused in these industries.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Include companies located in these locations.

parameters.name: revenue
parameters.description: Include companies with these revenue values.

parameters.name: employees
parameters.description: Include companies with this number of employees.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: RocketReach company ID.

post.description: Search for companies matching specified criteria such as name, domain, industry, location, revenue, and more.

get.description: Retrieve account details for the Universal API including credit usage and rate limits.
Look up a person's contact information using the Universal API with enhanced coverage.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the desired profile. Must specify along with current_employer.

parameters.name: current_employer
parameters.description: Current employer of the desired profile. Must specify along with name.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: An email address for the desired profile.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: RocketReach internal unique profile ID.

parameters.name: linkedin_url
parameters.description: LinkedIn URL of the desired profile.

parameters.name: lookup_type
parameters.description: Type of lookup to perform.

parameters.name: npi_number
parameters.description: An NPI number for the desired profile (US healthcare professional).

parameters.name: return_cached_emails
parameters.description: Controls whether cached emails are included in initial response when lookup status is progress.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Job title of the desired profile.

parameters.name: webhook_id
parameters.description: Your webhook's unique ID number for asynchronous callbacks.

post.description: Search for professionals using the Universal API with enhanced coverage and additional filtering options including healthcare and company-level filters.
Perform batch lookups for multiple people using the Universal API.

get.description: Check the status of one or more asynchronous universal person lookups by their profile IDs.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: List of Profile IDs to check status for.

get.description: Look up company information using the Universal API with enhanced coverage.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Include companies matching these names.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Include companies with these domains.

parameters.name: industry
parameters.description: Include companies focused in these industries.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Include companies located in these locations.

parameters.name: employees
parameters.description: Include companies with this number of employees.

parameters.name: revenue
parameters.description: Include companies with these revenue values.

parameters.name: funding
parameters.description: Include companies that raised this capital amount.

parameters.name: naics_code
parameters.description: Include companies with these NAICS codes.

parameters.name: sic_code
parameters.description: Include companies with these SIC codes.

post.description: Search for companies using the Universal API with enhanced coverage and additional filtering options.

ApiKeyAuth.name: RocketReachAPIKey
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key for authenticating requests to the RocketReach API.

allocated.description: Total credits allocated. May be an integer or 'inf' for unlimited.

remaining.description: Number of credits remaining. May be an integer or 'inf' for unlimited.

action.description: Action the rate limit applies to.

duration.description: Duration window for the rate limit.

limit.description: Maximum number of requests allowed. Null if unlimited.

used.description: Number of requests used in the current window.

remaining.description: Number of requests remaining. Null if unlimited.

current_employer_id.description: RocketReach company ID of current employer.

emails.description: Email addresses associated with the profile.

phones.description: Phone numbers associated with the profile.

validity.description: Validity status of the phone number.

recommended.description: Whether this is the recommended phone number.

premium.description: Whether this is a premium phone number.

end_date.description: End date of the position. Null if current.

current_title.description: Current job titles to filter by.

company_size.description: Company size ranges to filter by.

school.description: Schools or universities to filter by.

major.description: Majors or fields of study to filter by.

years_experience.description: Years of experience ranges to filter by.

contact_method.description: Preferred contact methods to filter by.

start.description: Start index of the request results (counting from 1).

page_size.description: Maximum number of results to return per page.

order_by.description: Specifies the ordering of search results.

ticker_symbol.description: Stock ticker symbol if publicly traded.

city.description: City where the company is located.

employees.description: Employee count ranges to filter by.

competitors.description: Competitor company names to filter by.

techstack.description: Technologies in the company's tech stack.

start.description: Start index of the request results (counting from 1).

page_size.description: Maximum number of results to return per page.

order_by.description: Specifies the ordering of search results.

BadRequest.description: Bad Request. The request is malformed or missing required parameters.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized. API Key is missing or invalid.

Forbidden.description: Forbidden. Insufficient permissions to access the resource.

NotFound.description: Not Found. The requested resource does not exist.

RateLimited.description: Too Many Requests. Rate limit exceeded.

InternalServerError.description: Internal Server Error. An unexpected error occurred on the server.

tags.name: Account
tags.description: Account management and API key operations.

tags.description: Person lookup, search, and bulk operations.

tags.description: Universal API person lookup, search, and bulk operations with enhanced coverage.
